description: Composition NAVY pullover made of 80% acrylic and 20% wool, with bold stripes in navy, green and fuchsia, ribbed cuffs and hems for snug Fit and brand tab on left chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees, using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron Do not dry clean Do not iron directly on print/trims/ logo Embrace autumn with this pullover from adidas.
